details.title: Agent Gateway Service Agent
details.description: Grants Agent Gateway Service Agent permissions required to do DNS peering.

details.title: Agent Registry API Admin
details.description: Full access to Agent Registry API resources.

details.title: Agent Registry API Editor
details.description: Edit access to Agent Registry API resources.

details.title: Agent Registry API Viewer
details.description: Readonly access to Agent Registry API resources.

details.title: Vertex AI Agent Sandbox Service Agent
details.description: Vertex AI Service Agent used to access Agent Sandbox managed resources in consumer project with restricted permissions.

details.title: Vertex AI Agent Engine Memory Editor Role
details.description: Grants edit access to Memory for Agent Engine.

details.title: Vertex AI Agent Engine Memory User Role
details.description: Grants full user access to Memory for Agent Engine.

details.title: Vertex AI Agent Engine Memory Viewer Role
details.description: Grants viewer access to Memory for Agent Engine.

details.title: Vertex AI Platform Publisher Provisioned Throughput Admin
details.description: Grants Publisher access to use all resources related to Vertex AI Provisioned Throughput Orders

details.title: Vertex AI Platform Publisher Provisioned Throughput Viewer
details.description: Grants Publisher access to view all resources related to Vertex AI Provisioned Throughput Orders

details.title: Vertex AI Agent Engine Session Editor Role
details.description: Grants edit access to Session for Agent Engine.

details.title: Vertex AI Agent Engine Session User Role
details.description: Grants full user access to Session for Agent Engine.

details.title: Vertex AI Agent Engine Session Viewer Role
details.description: Grants viewer access to Session for Agent Engine.

details.title: Apigee APIM Service Extension Service Agent
details.description: Service agent that grants access to the resources for managing the lifecyle for Apigee APIM Service Extensions.

details.title: Apigee Core Service Agent
details.description: Service agent that grants access to Apigee resources - API Products, Developers, Developer Apps, App Keys, and Apigee Environments (without granting impersonation permissions).

details.title: Backup and DR AlloyDB Operator
details.description: Allows a Backup and DR service account to discover and backup AlloyDB clusters.

details.title: Backup and DR Filestore Operator
details.description: Allows a Backup and DR service account to discover and backup Filestore instances.

details.title: BigQuery Authorized Routine Admin
details.description: Role for Authorized Routine to administer supported resources

details.title: BigQuery Authorized Routine Data Editor
details.description: Role for Authorized Routine to edit contents of supported resources

details.title: BigQuery Authorized Routine Data Viewer
details.description: Role for Authorized Routine to view data and contents of supported resources

details.title: BigQuery Authorized Routine Metadata Viewer
details.description: Role for Authorized Routine to view metadata of supported resources

details.title: User role for Business AI Code API
details.description: A user who can use Business AI Code API

details.title: Gemini Enterprise for Customer Experience Agent Editor
details.description: Full control over agent node structures, including instructions, tools, guardrails, callbacks, etc.

details.title: Gemini Enterprise for Customer Experience App Editor
details.description: Full control over app-level settings, such as logging settings, audio/voice configurations, etc.

details.title: Gemini Enterprise for Customer Experience Deployment Editor
details.description: Ability to manage deployments and configure specific app versions.

details.title: Gemini Enterprise for Customer Experience Evals Editor
details.description: Full control over evaluation datasets, runs, and results.

details.title: Gemini Enterprise for Customer Experience Guardrails Editor
details.description: Full control over safety settings and guardrails.

details.title: Gemini Enterprise for Customer Experience Security Settings Editor
Gemini Enterprise for Customer Experience Tools Editor
details.description: Full control over tools and toolsets.

details.title: Chronicle SOAR Remote Agent
details.description: Grants Remote Agent access to Chronicle SOAR.

details.title: Cloud API Registry Admin
details.description: Read/write access to Cloud API Registry resources.

details.title: Cloud API Registry Viewer
details.description: Read-only access to Cloud API Registry resources.

details.title: Cloud KMS Expert PQ Asymmetric Signing Key Manager
details.description: Enables PQ asymmetric signing key management.

details.title: Cloud KMS single-tenant HSM Executor
details.description: Grants ability to execute SingleTenantHsmInstanceProposal resources.

details.title: Cloud KMS single-tenant HSM Key Creator
details.description: Grants ability to use single-tenant HSM instances to create keys. This role must be combined with another role that grants the ability to create cryptoKeys.

details.title: Cloud KMS single-tenant HSM Proposer
details.description: Grants ability to create SingleTenantHsmInstances and SingleTenantHsmInstanceProposals.

details.title: Cloud KMS single-tenant HSM Quorum Member
details.description: Grants ability to approve SingleTenantHsmInstanceProposal resources.

details.title: Advisory Support Editor
details.description: Full read-write access to advisory support cases applicable for GCP Customer Care.

details.title: Advisory Support Viewer
details.description: Read-only access to advisory support cases applicable for GCP Customer Care.

details.title: Confidential GKE Workload User
details.description: Grants the ability to generate a GKE attestation token and run a workload in a GKE cluster.
